assessor_1_raw: AUROC as primary metric is standard and appropriate for readmission risk ranking. PR-AUC included as secondary metric. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Both Elixhauser and Charlson comorbidity indices are mentioned - either is appropriate. Both models receive the same comorbidity features. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: Stratified performance checks (disease severity, utilization quartile, age, temporal stability) provide comprehensive confound detection. Verdict: defense_wins.
